sections.label: Chorus
lines: A zozo hi! Takpi hi, vekpi’n zokhin hi;
Hih hi, mawh neite i sap, mawhna pulak ding.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sang pen a tokhom tung pan, kum in hong sih ciang;
Na khempeuh a vekin zo, A aw ngai dih un.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Lunggim van pua nasemte’n, koi-ah sem na hiam?
Khawl dih in Amah’n zozo, sawtpi pek

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Na vangikpi teng khia in, Jesuh khe kiang khia’n;
Amah bekbek kiang ding in, Na khempeuh

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Jesuh nasepsa muang in, na up theih mateng;
Hanciamna in kimanglo, sihna hong tunzaw.
